calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(name=[$0], age=[$1])
    LogicalFilter(condition=[=($1, 20)])
      CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, test]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..8=[{inputs}], expr#9=[20:BIGINT], expr#10=[=($t1, $t9)], proj#0..1=[{exprs}], $condition=[$t10])
    CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, test]])
